title: Cocktail Masterclass with Miranda
description: Learn the secrets of craft cocktail construction from award-winning mixologist Miranda Lrouge. Small group, hands-on experience.

title: Whiskey Flight Friday
description: Explore curated flights of premium American whiskeys with guided tasting notes and food pairings.

title: Rooftop Jazz and Cocktails
description: An unforgettable evening of live jazz, craft cocktails, and Detroit skyline views. Limited tickets available.

title: Brunch and Bottomless Mimosas
description: Weekend brunch with endless mimosas, Bloody Marys, and a rotating seasonal cocktail menu.

title: Gin Festival 2026
description: Detroit premier gin festival featuring 30+ distilleries, masterclasses, and exclusive tastings.

title: Craft Beer and Cocktail Social
description: A relaxed social mixer combining Detroit best craft breweries with signature cocktail stations.
